title: Mirrored Column Timelines Stopped Showing in Calendar View
excerpt: I created an overview board with mirrored columns for project timelines. At one point the calendar view stopped showing the timelines and I do not know when or why. I’ve tried deleting and remaking the calendar view and …

posts.author: mandymc (mandymc)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created an overview board with mirrored columns for project timelines. At one point the calendar view stopped showing the timelines and I do not know when or why. I’ve tried deleting and remaking the calendar view and toggling settings. Nothing has worked.

Any help would be appreciated!

Here are my calendar view settings:

Screen Shot 2022-01-03 at 10.19.07 AM1522×1618 217 KB

And a sample of a mirrored column that should be appearing:

Screen Shot 2022-01-03 at 10.19.23 AM1874×194 19.8 KB

posts.author: tweber (tara weber)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m having this same issue. I’ve tried deleting and readding as well, still haven’t found a solution.

posts.author: mandymc (mandymc)
posts.cookedHtml:
I actually figured it out!

One of the connected boards did not have a timeline column. For some reason that caused the calendar to not show ANY timelines. Once I added a timeline column to the offending board the calendar started workig.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
